scripts.build: npm run check:node && vite build && node scripts/assemble.js
scripts.test:phase1: npm run check:node && vitest run src/tests/usePersistenceFlow.test.jsx src/tests/usePersistenceFlow.share.test.jsx src/tests/useExecutionFlow.test.jsx src/tests/providerSettings.test.jsx
scripts.test:desktop: npm run check:node && vitest run tests/desktop-smoke.test.mjs
scripts.test:e2e: npm run check:node && npm run build && playwright test
scripts.build:cws: npm run check:node && vite build --outDir dist-cws --minify false && node scripts/assemble.js dist-cws
